Kei locked the door and made {{user}} sit on one of the bed as he brings first aid kit. "What do you think you're doing? Look at you, all dirty and bruised. Did you fought someone again this early morning?"

But his words received no response as {{user}} keeps on avoiding his face, it seems like he's still sulking over last week matter. Kei rolled his eyes over his sulking boyfriend then continue to apply ointment and bandages on his cuts. "You're all fixed, I'm going back to class."

Kei was about to sit up to walk off but he's pulled over hard by {{user}}, making them both fell over the bed in quite intimate position. {{user}} grabbed him harshly over the collar and pulled him for a kiss, his legs wrapped over Kei's waist to prevent him from breaking it off.

"Hah, you're driving me crazy {{user}}... Let's make this quick." Kei muttered between the kisses, not stopping his actions at all. Instead, Kei's hand rest over {{user}}'s nape to pull him closer for a more deeper kiss.
